index.title: Kaiwhakamāori Rauemi
index.description: Whakatuwheratia ngā tono kume kua whakamāoritia e te mihini mō ngā kōnae rauemi ki tētahi repo, ahakoa te hōputu.
index.badge: v3.0 — Kōpuku 24, whirihoranga repo, kupukupu, whakahaere maroke
index.lede: Ka whakatuwhera te Kaiwhakamāori Rauemi i ngā tono kume whakamāori-mīhini mō ō kōnae rauemi mā te whakamahi i te Azure AI Translator mā te SDK whaimana — kāore he ratonga tāpiri, he rerengamahi noa iho.
index.workflowTitle: Ko te whakawhitinga hei rerengamahi, ehara i te mahi.
index.workflowBody: Whakataka te hohenga ki tō CI tīariari, tohua ki Azure AI Translator, ka tuku i tō repo ki te kōrero i ngā reo katoa e ūnga ana koe.

formats.title: E ono ngā hōputu kōnae
formats.body: Ngā haerenga huri noa i te .resx, .xliff, .po, .json, .ini, me te .restext me te hōputu paita-pūmau.

config.title: Whirihoranga taumata-repo
config.body: Whakataka he .github/resource-translator.yml mō ngā kāwai whakauru, ngā kupukupu, me ngā kāwai Kaiwhakamāori Ritenga.

glossary.title: Kupukupu-mōhio
glossary.body: Maukatia ngā ingoa waitohu me ngā whakaritenga hua ki te regex rohe-kupu atamai e whakahaere ana i te C++, .NET, me ngā hoa.

dryRun.title: Whakahaere-maroke + hinganga ngohengohe
dryRun.body: Arokitea ngā whakawhitinga me te kore tuhi kōnae, whakakitea rānei ia hapa hei whakatūpato i a koe e auau ana.

outputs.title: Ngā huaputa ratarata PR
outputs.body: Summary-title, summary-details, and has-new-translations slot directly into create-pull-request.

sdk.title: SDK Azure Whaimana
sdk.body: I hangaia ki runga i te @azure-okiokinga/ai-translation-text + @azure/core-rest-pipeline — ka ngana anō aunoa i te 408/429/5xx, kāore he HTTP ā-ringa. esbuild-paiherea, arotaupū-horoi.

getting-started.title: Kei te tīmata
getting-started.lede: Tāpirihia tētahi kōnae rerengamahi, tohua ki ō taipitopito tuakiri Azure AI Translator, ā, mā te hohenga — i hangaia ki runga i te SDK @azure-rest/ai-translation-text mana a Microsoft — ka karapa i te repo mō ngā kōnae rauemi reo-pūtake, ā, ka whakaputa i ngā teina kua whakamāoritia.

provision.title: Whakarato rauemi Azure AI Translator
provision.body: Waihangatia tētahi rauemi Azure AI Translator ki te tomokanga Azure, kātahi ka penapena i ēnei e whai ake nei hei muna putunga GitHub kia taea ai e te rerengamahi te pānui:
provision.key: te kī ohaurunga mō te rauemi.
provision.region: te rohe Azure o te rauemi.

resource.title: Tukua he kōnae rauemi pūtake
resource.body: Ka whakamahia te Ingoa e ngā kōnae rauemi. <sourceLocale>. <ext> hui. Hei tauira, ka noho a Greetings.en.resx hei Greetings.fr.resx, Greetings.de.resx, me ērā atu mea i muri i te whakahaere.

output.title: Tirohia te huaputa
output.body: Ka mutu te rerengamahi, ka whakaaturia e te hohenga e toru ngā huaputa ka taea e koe te waea ki tētahi whakaahuatanga PR: taitara-whakarāpopoto, taipitopito-whakarāpopoto, me ngā whakamāoritanga-hōu. Ka tuhi hoki i tētahi whakarāpopototanga Markdown ki te whārangi mahi mā te core.summary.

nextSteps.title: Ngā tūmahi panuku
nextSteps.configuration: Whirihoratia ngā taunoa taumata-repo ki te .github/resource-translator.yml.
nextSteps.recipes: Tirohia ngā tohutohu mō ngā monorepos, ngā papakupu ritenga, me ngā kāwai Kaiwhakamāori Ritenga.

configuration.title: Whirihoranga
configuration.lede: Whakapuakina ngā taunoa kotahi i roto i te .github/resource-translator.yml ka tuku i ia rerengamahi kia riro i a rātou. Ka toa ngā tāurunga hohenga i ngā wā katoa ina tukua ngā mea e rua.

inputs.title: Ngā tāuru me ngā tāputa
inputs.lede: Ka whakaaetia hoki ia tāurunga i roto i te kōnae whirihoranga repo kōwhiringa. Ina tautuhia ngā mea e rua, ka toa te tāuru hohenga.

formats.title: Ngā hōputu kōnae
formats.heroTitle: Ngā hōputu kōnae e tautokona ana
formats.lede: E ono ngā hōputu rauemi ka taea te haere. Ka pānui te hohenga i ia kōnae pūtake-rohe, ka whakamāori i ngā uara, ka tuhi hoki i tētahi teina mō ia wāhi ūnga.

recipes.title: Ngā Tohutao
recipes.lede: Ngā tauira noa mō ngā whakawhitinga tuku: monorepos, glossaries, kāwai ritenga, whakahaere maroke, me te mana oro.

faq.title: Nga pātai e uiuitia ai
faq.lede: Ngā whakautu tere ki ngā pātai e puta ake ana i te nuinga o te wā e whāngai ana i te mahi.

translations.title: Ngā Whakawhitinga
translations.heroTitle: Kia ora i roto i ia reo
translations.pendingPrefix: e tārewa ana i te whakahaerenga o ngā tuhinga-whakamāori panuku.
translations.filterPlaceholder: Rapua mā te reo, waehere, ingoa taketake rānei...
translations.translationPending: E tārewa ana te whakawhitinga — whakatuwheratia he whakahaere tuhinga whakamāori.
translations.noLocales: Kāore he rohe e ōrite ana ki taua tātari.

contributing.title: Te Hāpai Ana
contributing.lede: E manakohia ana ngā pūrongo iro, ngā tono āhuahira, me ngā tono kume. He iti rawa te mahi kia rata ki ngā kaitāpae tuatahi.

changelog.title: Rangitaki Huringa
changelog.lede: Whakarāpopototanga taumata tiketike o ngā pānuitanga. E noho ana te changelog canonical, whai mana i roto i te CHANGELOG.md i roto i te whare putunga.
